title: Auto populating Connected Board Column with Existing Item Data
excerpt:
I understand we can create a connected board and link both boards with new item creation. 
However, is there a way to auto populate the connected Baord column with the existing item value without having to create a new i…

posts.author: ZackCarter (mr zack carter)
posts.cookedHtml:
I understand we can create a connected board and link both boards with new item creation.

However, is there a way to auto populate the connected Baord column with the existing item value without having to create a new item.

Screen shot showing Connected Board and I need to auto populate this column with all the values in the item column.

Screenshot 2025-05-01 at 09.08.242876×1474 376 KB

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Yep! You can use an automation. Set a trigger ie status change or column change - Create item in board (select which columns to map), then connect them.

posts.author: ZackCarter (mr zack carter)
posts.cookedHtml:
Apologies, I think I haven’t explained myself.

The connected board needs to be completed with existing item without creating a new item or status change

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Zack! Thanks for sharing your use case with us. Shannon here with the monday team. From what you’ve shared, a match automation should help achieve what you’re looking for!

If you open up the Automation Center, in the search bar under “Create,” enter “match.” The following automations will appear:

image1092×387 31.9 KB

This automation will link items in the Connect Boards Column using a matching or shared value across both of your boards. Taking a closer look at your screenshot, it looks like the item names are shared. Please note that this automation is very specific so the shared values must match exactly. As an example, on the current board, you have an item titled “Agco.” However, on the connected board, the associated item is titled “AGCO.” For these two items, the automation would not run as the values do not match exactly. You will need to ensure that the shared values have the same spelling, spacing, capitalization, and characters on both boards.

If you have any questions on how to utilize one of the match automations, let me know! It’d be helpful to understand when items from your connected board are linked. What actions take place on the current board before your team links the connected item?

posts.author: ZakiImtiaz (Zaki | readylogic.co)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Zack,

I guess you have been asking to add values in the connected column with already present items (without creating any items in any of the 2 boards.)

Additionally, looking at the image I think you have different information in 2 separate boards regarding the same items and you want to connect all the same available items in both fields.

For this I would suggest using the following automation in the mentioned way:

  1. Create an unique item column (e.g email, phone no, project id) in both boards.
  2. Place values against all the items in one board.
  3. Create this automation in the board (in which the new created column values are not present).
  4. Start placing the same values against respective items in this board.
  5. Each item should itself get connected to the item in the other board with same column value.

f705cb5bd2596947dd6b8656413833396b23157b_2_690x244225×175 6.57 KB

Zaki

Business Workflow Consultant

Ready Logic

posts.author: tahirabbasbaig (Tahir Abbas Baig)
posts.cookedHtml:
i got it thanks to you i didn’t lose my hope for searching how to solve this probelm. i got a perfect solution for your probelm there is one automation you can use that help you copy the same data that entered in item without copying and paste in connected board. Sorry guys if my english is not perfect.
use this template on your board.

image385×165 6.36 KB

  1. you have to select the DB board the connect board in another borad that mention below.
  2. select any column in current board that will be change like status bar or like your’s tick coulmn in when coulmn.
  3. connect click on it and you will see your mentioned board select again.
  4. this column select the coulmn that is matched your DB. Like in your case the item name column.
  5. another column select the DB item name column.

image1249×170 9.41 KB

now when every you tick that coulmn or status bar change the entries will come auto no need to copy and paste.

important points!

  1. after removing the points or change staus bar to N/A the data will be remaining in the connect board column.
  2. the data that wil be auto come will be top row in your DB board. if you need any specifec you can change manualy
